message:
fix(test): expand Outcome match arms in explorer orphaned-sender test

Replace the catch-all `other => panic!` arm in the pool.acquire() match
with explicit Outcome::Err, Outcome::Cancelled, and Outcome::Panicked
arms so the test compiles cleanly with exhaustive match checking and
produces more specific panic messages on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
